  "findings": [
    "Wrong wirenut size staged for terminations — incorrect connector rating for conductor count and gauge",
    "NEC 110.14 requires terminations be properly sized and rated for conductors; wrong wirenut risks poor contact, overheating, and failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove incorrect wirenuts from staging area",
    "Select wirenuts matching conductor count, AWG range, and voltage rating per manufacturer specifications",
    "Verify replacement wirenuts are listed for the application and conductor combination"
  ],
  "rationale": "A wrong-size wirenut cannot provide a compliant, reliable splice under NEC 110.14. Using a connector outside its rated conductor range risks loose connections, arcing, and thermal failure. Since work is staged and not yet started, the corrective action is to replace the incorrect material before any terminations are made.",
  "references": ["NEC 110.14"]
}
